Categories.Label: Birds played
Categories.Description: Variable points printed on each bird card (1-9).

Categories.Label: Bonus cards
Categories.Description: Variable points per personal bonus card objective.

Categories.Label: End-of-round goals
Categories.Description: 5/2/1 or 4/2/1 points per round based on rank in goal.

Categories.Label: Food cached
Categories.Description: 1 point per food cached on a bird card.

Categories.Label: Tucked cards
Categories.Description: 1 point per card tucked under a bird for ability.

Reasoning: Curated 2026-05-31 from Wingspan rulebook (data/rulebook/wingspan_en_rulebook.pdf). 5 custom food dice with 6 faces, 4-round structure with decreasing turn count (8/7/6/5), 6 additive scoring categories with mix of Count/Sum/RankBased computations. Tiebreakers: bonus card points then total food.

ExcludedTools.Reason: Rulebook explicitly states no time limit per turn or round.
Bird cards use a fixed 3-card display + discard, not a generic shuffled deck. Bird display is a game-specific widget.
